# awesome-zsh-plugins

A collection of ZSH frameworks, plugins, themes and tutorials.

**Source:** [unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins](https://github.com/unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins)

## Table of Contents

- [Completions](#completions)
- [Fonts](#fonts)
- [Frameworks](#frameworks)
- [Other Resources](#other-resources)
- [Plugins](#plugins)
- [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)
- [Setups](#setups)
- [Themes](#themes)
- [Tutorials](#tutorials)
